lines: [long pause] [long pause]

Box breathing. [long pause] Four equal sides. [long pause] Inhale, hold, exhale, hold — four counts each. [long pause] Used by Navy SEALs and ER doctors to reset under pressure. [long pause] It works because equal-duration breathing phases stabilize your heart rate variability and engage your parasympathetic nervous system.
[long pause] [long pause]
Find a comfortable position. [long pause] We'll do six cycles. [long pause] I'll count for you.
[long pause] [long pause]
[long pause]
